---
title: "Dario's Learning Journey"
subtitle: "Technical Notes, Conference Insights & Development Guides"
date: last-modified
author: "Dario Airoldi"
description: "A collection of technical learning notes, conference insights, Azure guides, and development tips."
---

Welcome to my technical learning hub! This repository contains my ongoing journey through technology, including conference notes, Azure development guides, and practical development tools and techniques.

## 🚀 Recent Highlights

### Build 2025 Conference Coverage

Comprehensive notes from Microsoft Build 2025, covering the latest in .NET development, AI integration, and cloud technologies.

### Azure Development Guides

Practical guides for working with Azure services, including naming conventions, storage options, and best practices.

### Development Tools & Techniques

Hands-on guides for improving development workflows, testing strategies, and documentation practices.

## 📚 What You'll Find Here

::::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### 🎯 Conference Notes

- **Build 2025 Sessions**: Deep dives into .NET Aspire, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, and AI development
- **Technical Sessions**: BRK and DEM session notes with key takeaways
- **Demo Code**: Sample implementations and code examples

:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### ☁️ Azure Topics

- **Naming Conventions**: Azure resource naming best practices
- **Storage Solutions**: Table Storage and CosmosDB access patterns
- **Best Practices**: Production-ready Azure development patterns

:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### 🛠️ Development Tools

- **Git Management**: Command-line repository management techniques
- **Testing Tools**: HTTP files for API testing and validation
- **Documentation**: Quarto setup for GitHub Pages publishing

:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### 🔧 Issues & Solutions

- **Troubleshooting**: Common development issues and their solutions
- **Error Fixes**: Step-by-step resolution guides
- **Workarounds**: Alternative approaches when standard methods fail

:::

::::

## 🗺️ Navigation Guide

### By Topic

- **[Build 2025](202506%20Build%202025/README.md)** - Conference sessions and insights
- **[Azure Development](20250702%20Azure%20Naming%20conventions/Azure-Samples-Naming-Convention.md)** - Cloud development practices
- **[Development Tools](20250709%20Manage%20GitRepo%20from%20commandline/README.md)** - Productivity enhancements
- **[Issue Solutions](_ISSUES/20250709%20fatal%20error%20cloning%20a%20repo%20with%20Visual%20Studio/README.md)** - Problem resolution guides

### By Date

All content is organized chronologically with date prefixes for easy temporal navigation and reference.

## 🎯 Learning Philosophy

This repository reflects a continuous learning approach:

- **Document Everything**: Capture insights while they're fresh
- **Share Knowledge**: Make learning accessible to others
- **Iterate Quickly**: Update and improve based on new discoveries
- **Connect Concepts**: Link related topics and build comprehensive understanding

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. **Browse by Interest**: Use the navigation above to find topics that interest you
2. **Follow Along**: Many guides include step-by-step instructions you can follow
3. **Contribute**: Found an issue or have a suggestion? [Open an issue](https://github.com/darioairoldi/Learn/issues)
4. **Stay Updated**: Watch the repository for new content and updates

## 📈 Recent Updates

The most recent content includes:

- Quarto documentation setup for GitHub Pages
- HTTP file testing strategies  
- Azure naming convention guidelines
- Build 2025 conference session notes

---

*This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/). The content is continuously updated as I learn and discover new techniques and insights.*
